steps.title: Set up the speed formula for miles per hour
steps.content:
To convert a rate from miles per minute to miles per hour, multiply by the conversion factor 60 minutes/hour. Speed is distance divided by time, so:
$$\text{speed (mph)} = \frac{\text{distance (miles)} \times 60}{\text{time (minutes)}}$$

steps.title: Calculate the average speed and round
steps.content:
Substituting the given values: distance = 13 miles, time = 27 minutes:
$$\text{speed} = \frac{13 \times 60}{27} = \frac{780}{27} = 28.888...$$
Rounding to the nearest tenth of a mile per hour gives 28.9 mph.
